name: Louli
greetingText: Sooo I built you another website!
wishText: I am so happy to be able to see you grow over the last year, you are maturing and shaping to be a highly sucessful architect. You make me want to be a better man. I love you so much. You are the most beautiful person alive💖
textInChatBox: Happy birthday to you!! Wish you all the best, Lana! 🥳 🥳 🥳
text2: I was thinking about sending a message
text3: but then, I had an idea
text4: I realised, I wanted to do something
text5Content: You are special to me Lola 💖
outroText: I hope you liked it! Can't wait to take you out hottie :D
